title: Accessible Search

statement.markdown:
## Accessible Search
Design an easy-to-use search bar that follows accessibility guidelines.
### Requirements
1. The search input should be labeled with a clear and descriptive text.
2. The search icon should be visually hidden for screen readers.
3. The search results should be displayed below the search input and be accessible through a keyboard only.
4. The search results should show a list of suggestions based on the input.
5. The search results should be filterable by a user-selected category.

constraints: Search input label is clear and descriptive.
Search icon is visually hidden for screen readers.
Search results are accessible through a keyboard only.
Search results are accessible and display suggestions based on input.
Search results are filterable by a user-selected category.
